overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player moves from a sidewalk under an elevated highway through a commercial plaza, enters a vividly colored corridor, and emerges into an open plaza with the Softsys building.

events.description: passing large red billboard with 'I'll knock the devil out of you' text, neon illumination intensifies on right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing vending booths and neon signs

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure spanning the street above
tall palm trees lining the street beyond the sidewalk
teal and pink illuminated vending machine booth
large red billboard displaying 'I'll knock the devil out of you' with figure image
black directional sign with 'HEYWOOD' text and arrows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway structure. Palm trees line the distant street while neon-lit vending booths and billboards illuminate the right side. The camera passes under the overpass with sparse pedestrian traffic and occasional vehicles visible on the left.

events.description: entering the Sixshots corridor entrance from the open plaza

agents.ego_description: approaching the Sixshots entrance, passing by the circular fountain and vending kiosks in the plaza

notable_agents.action: person in green top and pink pants standing near the Max It Up billboard

entered.detail: round water feature with concrete edge in the plaza center
large commercial building with green 'softsys' neon signage
corridor entrance with bright pink 'SIXSHOTS' neon signage
large illuminated advertisement with woman and 'MAX IT UP' text

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide commercial plaza featuring a circular fountain at its center. The Softsys building looms in the background with green neon signage while the camera approaches the vividly lit Sixshots entrance. Pedestrians stand near the Max It Up billboard as the player enters the pink-lit corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial corridor with color-changing lights

events.description: corridor lighting shifts from intense pink to cyan and green tones
approaching the exit of the Sixshots corridor into open area

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow corridor with color-changing neon lights, passing pedestrians standing against the walls

notable_agents.action: large man in tank top leaning against the wall near the Chillax sign

entered.detail: low ceiling with geometric paneling and recessed lighting
metal shutter doors with ventilation grilles along the corridor wall
illuminated sign reading 'CHILLAX' in white neon

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow enclosed corridor bathed in intense pink and purple neon light that shifts to cyan and green tones. Shuttered storefronts line the right wall while pedestrians stand or walk through the passage. The Chillax neon sign becomes visible as the player approaches the corridor exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with stairs and commercial buildings

events.description: exiting the Sixshots corridor into the open plaza with illuminated stairs
ascending stairs and approaching the Softsys building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking up illuminated stairs into the open plaza, approaching the Softsys building with green neon signage

entered.detail: concrete stairs with illuminated edges leading up to plaza level
mature trees planted in raised concrete planters
large vertical billboard with 'WATSON WHORE' text in pink neon
metal railing along the edge of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: Exiting the corridor, the scene opens into a wide plaza with illuminated stairs leading upward. The Softsys building dominates the left side with bright green neon signage, while the Watson Whore billboard is visible in the distance. The camera ascends the stairs, passing plaza trees and approaching the building entrance along an elevated walkway with metal railings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a shadowed urban underpass into a vibrant, neon-saturated corporate plaza. It begins by walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway, passing neon-lit vending booths and palm trees under the heavy overpass. As the camera emerges from the shadows, the environment opens into a wide commercial plaza centered around a circular fountain, moving past pedestrians and billboards toward the glowing entrance of a pink-lit corridor. The scene then shifts into a narrow enclosed passage bathed in intense pink, purple, and cyan neon light, gliding past shuttered storefronts before reaching the exit. Finally, the camera breaks out into a wide open plaza, ascending illuminated stairs and passing plaza trees toward the towering Softsys building and its bright green signage along an elevated metal walkway.
